activities_projects.title: Market Research Report
activities_projects.objective: Conduct an in-depth study of a local market
steps: Select a local market to study
Observe the types of goods, number of shops, pricing, and customer behavior
Collect data on at least 10 products regarding price, demand, and supply
Prepare a detailed report analyzing trends, pricing strategies, and market challenges
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop skills in systematic research and market analysis
activities_projects.evaluation: Depth of analysis, data accuracy, and report presentation (15 marks)

activities_projects.title: Case Study: Seasonal Market Changes
activities_projects.objective: Analyze the effect of seasons on market operations
materials: Market price records or online data
steps: Select 5 seasonal products (fruits, vegetables, or clothing)
Record prices and availability over 1–2 months
Identify patterns in supply and demand changes
Write a case study report with charts and conclusions
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand economic factors affecting markets
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy of data, logical reasoning, and reporting (15 marks)

activities_projects.title: Supply Chain Mapping
activities_projects.objective: Trace a product’s journey from producer to consumer
steps: Select one product (e.g., rice, clothes, or toys)
Identify all stages: production, transport, wholesaler, retailer, and sale
Prepare a detailed flowchart showing each step and time/cost involved
Analyze challenges and efficiencies in the supply chain
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand complexities of market supply chains
activities_projects.evaluation: Completeness, clarity of flowchart, and analysis (15 marks)

activities_projects.title: Price Determination Study
activities_projects.objective: Investigate how prices are set in markets
steps: Select 3 products with variable prices
Collect price data from multiple sellers
Analyze factors affecting price differences (e.g., quality, demand, bargaining)
Present findings in a table with explanations
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand market pricing and influencing factors
activities_projects.evaluation: Data accuracy and analytical reasoning (15 marks)

activities_projects.title: Economic Impact Report
activities_projects.objective: Examine how markets influence the local economy
steps: Identify a local market and its contribution to employment and income
Analyze types of businesses and services offered
Write a report explaining the market's economic role in the community
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students connect market operations with economic outcomes
activities_projects.evaluation: Depth of analysis and clarity of report (15 marks)

activities_projects.title: Digital Market Analysis
activities_projects.objective: Compare online and offline market strategies
steps: Choose two products sold both online and offline
Compare pricing, promotions, and customer reviews
Analyze which platform is more advantageous for sellers and buyers
Present findings with graphs and summary
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand e-commerce and digital market dynamics
activities_projects.evaluation: Analytical depth and presentation quality (15 marks)

activities_projects.title: Consumer Behavior Analysis
activities_projects.objective: Study patterns of buying and decision-making
steps: Prepare a 10-question survey on consumer preferences and buying habits
Interview at least 20 people in different age groups
Analyze responses to identify trends and factors influencing purchases
Present results in charts or graphs with conclusions
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop skills in research, data interpretation, and presentation
activities_projects.evaluation: Survey design, data accuracy, and analysis (15 marks)

activities_projects.title: Market Problem-Solving Activity
activities_projects.objective: Apply critical thinking to market challenges
steps: Identify common market problems (e.g., congestion, pricing conflicts, supply shortage)
Propose practical solutions using observations or research
Write a detailed solution report with pros and cons for each idea
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop problem-solving and decision-making skills

activities_projects.title: Market Evolution Timeline
activities_projects.objective: Understand how markets have changed over time
steps: Research the history of local and national markets
Identify key developments (barter system, money economy, malls, online markets)
Create a timeline showing evolution and major changes
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students connect historical and modern market systems
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy of timeline and completeness of information (15 marks)

activities_projects.title: Comprehensive Market Presentation
steps: Compile findings from activities 1–9
Prepare a detailed presentation analyzing market structure, pricing, supply chain, and consumer behavior
Present to classmates with charts, tables, and key insights
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop advanced analytical, research, and communication skills
activities_projects.evaluation: Presentation depth, data interpretation, and clarity (15 marks)
